description:
With Stream Deck, unleash your creative genius and make waves across Twitch and YouTube. All while focusing on what matters most your audience. As a broadcaster that likes to produce on the fly and have high quality production.


What's new in Stream Deck 7.4.1?

AI Tools, Meet Stream Deck
Stream Deck now supports the Model Context Protocol (MCP), letting AI tools connect and trigger designated actions. NVIDIA Project G-Assist, the on-device AI assistant for GeForce RTX PCs, is the first to connect — and it brings something entirely new to Stream Deck: voice control. For the first time, you can trigger your actions just by speaking.

Watch how to set up G-Assist with Stream Deck
Learn more about integrating your AI Tools with Stream Deck.
*NVIDIA G-Assist requires GeForce RTX GPU with at least 6GB VRAM.

Improvements and bug fixes
- Improved account sign-in behavior to address an issue where account authentication windows would pop up repeatedly in your browser — the app will no longer automatically open your browser to prompt for Twitch, YouTube, or other account logins.
- Updated CORSAIR Galleon 100 SD firmware (3.06.005), which resolves a display issue affecting some units. The update is applied automatically when your device connects.
- (macOS) Updated default profiles for Galleon 100 SD and Stream Deck + XL.
- (Windows) Fixed an issue where the Toggle Virtual Stream Deck key could appear visually stuck after the interface was reopened. Functionality was not affected.
- (macOS) Fixed an issue where the Open Application action didn't display third-party apps in the dropdown list.
- Fixed a bug where nested Switch Profile actions inside a Multi Action could lose their internal references when imported.
- Fixed an issue where Key Logic displayed an overwrite confirmation when pasting into an empty key.
- Fixed an issue where the previous/next button indicators on Stream Deck Neo appeared black instead of reflecting the info bar color.

Want to share feedback on Stream Deck 7.4.1? Connect with us:
- Leave a comment on our Subreddit
- Chat with fellow community members on Discord
- Hit up @elgato on X
- Discover more on Explorer
- Contact our Support Team

1Password menu is available. Press down arrow to select.
